sentence: 医生检查后发现肛门附近有炎症。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiǎnchá hòu fāxiàn gāngmén fùjìn yǒu yánzhèng.
english: The doctor found inflammation near the anus after examination.

sentence: 这座修道院建于一千年前。
pinyin: Zhè zuò xiūdàoyuàn jiàn yú yīqiān nián qián.
english: This monastery was built a thousand years ago.

pinyin: Tā diàozhuǎn chētóu, wǎng huí kāi qù.
english: He turned the car around and drove back.

sentence: 法院考虑到他认罪态度好，决定从轻处罚。
pinyin: Fǎyuàn kǎolǜ dào tā rènzuì tàidu hǎo, juédìng cóngqīng chǔfá.
english: The court decided to be lenient in sentencing given his cooperative attitude.

sentence: 她打扮成萝莉风格参加了漫展。
pinyin: Tā dǎbàn chéng luólì fēnggé cānjiā le màn zhǎn.
english: She dressed in Lolita style to attend the comic convention.
